tool_description: Real-time and historical cricket statistics tool. Fetches live scores, player batting/bowling averages, recent matches, and full scorecards using the free cricketdata.org REST API — no API key required.

functions.name: get_live_scores
functions.description: Fetch all currently live cricket matches with their scores and match status.

outputs.name: matches
outputs.description: List of live match dicts, each containing match_id, teams, score, status, and match_type.

functions.name: get_player_stats
functions.description: Search for a cricket player by name and return their career batting and bowling statistics.

parameters.name: player_name
parameters.description: Full or partial name of the player (e.g. 'Virat Kohli', 'Rohit Sharma').

outputs.name: batting
outputs.description: Career batting stats: matches, innings, runs, average, strike_rate, hundreds, fifties, highest.

outputs.name: bowling
outputs.description: Career bowling stats: matches, wickets, economy, average, best_bowling.

functions.name: get_recent_matches
functions.description: Get a list of recently completed international cricket matches.

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: Maximum number of recent matches to return (default 10, max 20).

outputs.name: matches
outputs.description: List of recent match dicts with match_id, teams, result, date, venue, and match_type.

functions.name: get_match_scorecard
functions.description: Fetch the full scorecard for a specific match using its match ID.

parameters.name: match_id
parameters.description: The unique match ID returned by get_live_scores() or get_recent_matches().

outputs.name: match_info
outputs.description: Basic match info: teams, venue, date, match_type, status, toss.

outputs.name: innings
outputs.description: List of innings, each with team, runs, wickets, overs.
